metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_2114
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig.2: "Endocannabinoid-Mediated Retrograde Suppression Is Absent in the Cerebellum of α-KO Mice"

Fig.3: "Endocannabinoid-Mediated Retrograde Suppression Is Absent in the Hippocampus and Striatum of α-KO Mice"

Note1: the retrograde aspect of the effect is demonstrated by the effect of depolarization of the postsynaptic cell that has effects on the presynaptic release of neurotransmitter.
Note2: The effect is shown to be on GABAergic and Glutamatergic synaptic currents in the hippocampus and striatum. I did not have sufficient space in the menus to accomodate this combinatorial complexity.. Experimental description: "Mice were decapitated following CO2 anesthesia, a..."
